identity.name: 1117 Meats & Pantry
identity.address: West Queen West (1117 Queen St W)

narrative.summary: Opened May 2025 inside a stunning 1902 heritage post office building. Butcher + artisan pantry. The building alone is worth the visit — architecture meets food. 4.8★, 73 reviews. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
